---
title: "Bangladesh Population Density"
author: "Dash-61"
date: "2026-03-04"
format: html
---

# Analysis of Population Density

This is a Quarto notebook analyzing the population density of Bangladesh across various regions.

## Data Sources

- Bangladesh Bureau of Statistics
- World Bank

## Key Findings

- The population density varies significantly across different districts.
- Urban areas tend to have higher population densities compared to rural areas.

## Visualization

```{r}
# Example R code to plot population density
library(ggplot2)

# Load some example data
# data <- read.csv('population_density.csv')
# ggplot(data, aes(x=district, y=density)) + geom_bar(stat='identity')
```

## Conclusion

Further analysis will be required to understand the implications of population density on infrastructure and services.
